title.ko: 비전기적 변수를 제어하거나 조절하기 위한 시스템
title.en: SYSTEMS FOR CONTROLLING OR REGULATING NON-ELECTRIC VARIABLES

definition.ko: 제어 : 속도 또는 가속도; 힘; 압력; 토크(TORQUE); 기계적 진동 G05D13/00; 15/00; 16/00; 17/00; 19/00 제어 : 유량; 레벨; 비율 G05D7/00; 9/00; 11/00 제어: 온도; 습도; 점도; 화학적 또는 물리화학적 변량; 빛의 강도 G05D23/00; 22/00; 24/00; 21/00; 25/00 위치, 방향, 디멘젼(DIMENSION)의 제어 G05D1/00 ～ 5/00 둘 이상 변수의 동시제어 G05D27/00; 29/00 이 서브 클래스의 다른 그룹으로 분류되지 않는 주제사항 G05D99/00

title.ko: 육상, 해상, 공중 또는 우주선의 위치, 진로, 고도 또는 자세 제어, 예. 자동조종 장치 사용를 사용하는 것 (자율주행차량에 특별히 적용된 주행 제어 시스템 B60W60/00)
title.en: Control of position, course, altitude or attitude of land, water, air or space vehicles, e.g. using automatic pilots (drive control systems specially adapted for autonomous road vehicles B60W0060000000)

definition.ko: 이 메인그룹에서, 인덱싱 코드 그룹 G05D101/00 ~ G05D111/00의 추가가 권고된다.

title.ko: 제어 시스템 입력
title.en: Control system inputs
Command input arrangements
Remote-control arrangements
operated by humans
Command input arrangements on the remote controller, e.g. joysticks or touch screens
Output arrangements on the remote controller, e.g. displays, haptics or speakers
operated by off-board computers
Communication links with the remote-control arrangements
Handing over between remote control and on-board control; Handing over between remote control arrangements
Command input arrangements located on-board unmanned vehicles
using voice or gesture commands
Command input data, e.g. waypoints

title.ko: 위치 또는 방향을 결정하기 위한 장치
title.en: Arrangements for determining position or orientation
Means for detecting physical contact, e.g. touch sensors or bump sensors

title.ko: 탈것에 의해 생성된 파동의 반사에 기반한 수단(탈것 외부의 수동 항법 보조 장치 사용 G05D1/244; 탈것 외부의 인공 소스에서 제공되는 신호 사용 G05D1/247)
title.en: Means based on the reflection of waves generated by the vehicle (using passive navigation aids external to the vehicle G05D0001244000;using signals provided by artificial sources external to the vehicle G05D0001247000)

title.ko: 환경에서 자연적으로 발생하는 신호를 캡처하는 수단, 예. 주변 광학, 음향, 중력 또는 자기 신호(탈것 외부의 수동 항법 보조 장치 사용 G05D1/244; 탈것 외부에 위치한 위치 센서의 신호 사용 G05D1/249)
title.en: Means capturing signals occurring naturally from the environment, e.g. ambient optical, acoustic, gravitational or magnetic signals (using passive navigation aids external to the vehicle G05D0001244000;using signals from positioning sensors located off-board the vehicle G05D0001249000)
using passive navigation aids external to the vehicle, e.g. markers, reflectors or magnetic means
using dead reckoning
using environment maps, e.g. simultaneous localisation and mapping [SLAM]
using signals provided by artificial sources external to the vehicle, e.g. navigation beacons
generated by satellites, e.g. GPS
from positioning sensors located off-board the vehicle, e.g. from cameras
Control within particular dimensions
Control of position or course in two dimensions [2D]
resulting in a change of level, e.g. negotiating lifts or stairs
for aircraft during their ground movement
Control of position or course in three dimensions [3D]
for unpowered vehicles, e.g. gliders or parachutes
for movement inside a confined volume, e.g. indoor flying
Control of altitude or depth
Control of rate of change of altitude or depth
Control of attitude, i.e. control of roll, pitch or yaw
to ensure stability

title.ko: 의도한 제어 결과
title.en: Intended control result

title.ko: 외부 환경 조건을 보상하거나 활용하는 것, 예. 바람이나 물의 흐름(스테이션 유지 G05D1/611)
title.en: Compensating for or utilising external environmental conditions, e.g. wind or water currents (station keeping G05D0001611000)
Station keeping, e.g. for hovering or dynamic anchoring

title.ko: 안전 또는 보호, 예. 장애물 주변의 보호 구역 정의 또는 위험 회피(두 대 이상의 탈것 간의 충돌을 피하기 위해 위치 또는 경로를 제어하기 위한 장치 G05D1/693; 시스템 또는 조작자 고장에 대응하거나 예방하기 위한 장치 G05D1/80)
title.en: Safety or protection, e.g. defining protection zones around obstacles or avoiding hazards (arrangements for controlling the position or course of two or more vehicles for avoiding collisions therebetween G05D0001693000;arrangements for reacting to or preventing system or operator failure G05D0001800000)

title.ko: 장애물 회피(도로 차량의 충돌 가능성 또는 임박성 예측 또는 방지 B60W30/08)
title.en: Obstacle avoidance (predicting or avoiding probable or impending collision of road vehicles B60W0030080000)
following the obstacle profile, e.g. a wall or undulated terrain
Dynamic obstacles
Resolving or avoiding being stuck or obstructed
Optimisation of travel parameters, e.g. of energy consumption, journey time or distance
Following a predefined trajectory, e.g. a line marked on the floor or a flight path
Performing a task within a working area or space, e.g. cleaning
Following a desired speed profile

title.ko: 이륙(페이로드 전달 또는 회수 G05D1/667)
title.en: Take-off (delivering or retrieving payloads G05D0001667000)

title.ko: 착륙(기지국에 도킹 G05D1/661)
title.en: Landing (docking at a base station G05D0001661000)

title.ko: 페이로드 또는 외부 엔터티와의 상호 작용
title.en: Interaction with payloads or external entities

title.ko: 기지국에 도킹(페이로드전달 또는 검색 G05D1/667)
title.en: Docking at a base station (delivering or retrieving payloads G05D0001667000)
Delivering or retrieving payloads
Positioning of towed, pushed or suspended implements, e.g. ploughs

title.ko: 묶여있는 탈것용(견인되거나 밀거나 매달린 기구를 위치시키는 것 G05D1/672)
title.en: for tethered vehicles (positioning towed, pushed or suspended implements G05D0001672000)

title.ko: 움직이는 표적 요격(기지국에 도킹 G05D1/661)
title.en: Intercepting moving targets (docking at a base station G05D0001661000)

title.ko: 움직이는 대상과 관련하여 상대적인 위치를 유지하는 것, 예. 동물이나 인간을 따라가는 것(표적을 향해 페이로드를 지시하기 위한 것 G05D1/689; 두 대 이상의 탈것의 위치나 경로를 제어하는 것과 관련된 것 G05D1/69)
title.en: Maintaining a relative position with respect to moving targets, e.g. following animals or humans  (for pointing payloads towards targets G05D0001689000; involving controlling the position or course of two or more vehicles G05D0001690000)

title.ko: 고정 또는 이동 대상을 향한 페이로드 지정(견인되거나 밀거나 매달린 기구위치 지정 G05D1/672)
title.en: Pointing payloads towards fixed or moving targets (positioning towed, pushed or suspended implements G05D0001672000)

title.ko: 두 대 이상의 차량의 위치 또는 경로를 조정하여 제어
title.en: Coordinated control of the position or course of two or more vehicles
involving a plurality of disparate vehicles
for avoiding collisions between vehicles
for maintaining a fixed relative position of the vehicles, e.g. for convoy travelling or formation flight

title.ko: 두 대 이상의 차량이 집결하는 경우, 예. 기내 급유용(기지국에 도킹 G05D1/661)
title.en: for rendezvous of two or more vehicles, e.g. for in-flight refuelling (docking at a base station G05D0001661000)
Control allocation

title.ko: 시스템 또는 운영자 오류에 대응하거나 예방하기 위한 장치(원격 제어와 온보드 제어 간 핸드오버링 또는 원격 제어 장치 간 핸드오버링 G05D1/227)
title.en: Arrangements for reacting to or preventing system or operator failure  (handing over between remote control and on-board control, or handing over between remote control arrangements G05D0001227000)
Handing over between on-board automatic and on-board manual control

title.ko: 제한된 권한 제어, 예. 비행 범위 강화(가속도 또는 구조적 응력의 제한 G05D1/83)
title.en: Limited authority control, e.g. enforcing a flight envelope  (limitation of acceleration or structural stress G05D0001830000)
Limitation of acceleration or structural stress
Fail-safe operations, e.g. limp home mode
Monitoring the performance of the system, e.g. alarm or diagnosis modules
using redundant control arrangements

title.ko: 위치 또는 방향의 제어 (G05D1/00이 우선; 위치 지정을 실행하기 위한 수치 제어 G05B19/18)
title.en: Control of position or direction  (G05D0001000000 takes precedence; numerical control to execute positioning G05B0019180000)
without using feedback

title.ko: 피드백을 사용하는 것
title.en: using feedback

title.ko: 아날로그 비교기를 사용하는 것
title.en: using an analogue comparing device

title.ko: 그의 출력치가 다수의 불연속치만을 취하는 것 (G05D 3/18이 우선)
title.en: whose output amplitude can only take a number of discrete values (G05D0003180000 takes precedence)
delivering a series of pulses
using a digital comparing device
Control of dimensions of material
of thickness, e.g. of rolled material
characterised by the use of electric means
of the size of items, e.g. of particles
characterised by the use of electric means

title.ko: 유량의 제어 (레벨 제어 G05D9/00; 유량비의 제어 G05D11/00)
title.en: Control of flow  (level control G05D0009000000; control of flow ratio G05D0011000000)
without auxiliary power
with auxiliary non-electric power
characterised by the use of electric means
Level control, e.g. controlling quantity of material stored in vessel
without auxiliary power
with auxiliary non-electric power
characterised by the use of electric means

title.ko: 유량비의 제어 (화학적 또는 물리화학적 변수의 제어, 예. pH값, G05D21/00; 습도의 제어 G05D22/00; 온도가 다른 두 유체의 혼합비를 변화시켜 온도 제어 G05D23/13; 점도의 조절 G05D24/00)
title.en: Control of flow ratio   (control of chemical or physico-chemical variables, e.g. pH-value, G05D0021000000; control of humidity G05D0022000000;  control of temperature by varying the mixing ratio of two fluids having different temperatures G05D0023130000; control of viscosity G05D0024000000)
Controlling ratio of two or more flows of fluid or fluent material
without auxiliary power
with auxiliary non-electric power
by sensing weight of individual components, e.g. gravimetric procedure
by sensing density of mixture, e.g. using aerometer
by sensing concentration of mixture, e.g. by measuring pH-value
by sensing moisture of non-aqueous liquids
by sensing viscosity of mixture
characterised by the use of electric means
Controlling mixing ratio of fluids having different temperatures, e.g. by sensing the temperature of a mixture of fluids having different viscosities
Control of linear speed; Control of angular speed; Control of acceleration or deceleration, e.g. of a prime mover
Details
providing for emergency tripping of an engine in case of exceeding maximum speed
providing for damping of erratic vibrations in governors
without auxiliary power
Centrifugal governors with fly-weights
Details
Fly-weights; Mountings thereof; Adjusting equipment for limits, e.g. temporarily
Risers; Transmission gear therefor; Restoring mechanisms therefor
counterbalanced by spider springs acting immediately upon the fly-weights
counterbalanced by spider springs acting upon the articulated riser
counterbalanced by fluid pressure acting upon the articulated riser
counterbalanced by two or more different appliances acting simultaneously upon the riser, e.g. with both spring force and fluid pressure or with both spring force and electromagnetic force
with provision for modulating the degree of non-uniformity of speed
with provision for performing braking effects in case of increased speed
Governors characterised by fluid features in which the speed of a shaft is converted into fluid pressure
using a pump
with auxiliary non-electric power
using regulating devices with proportional band, i.e. P. regulating devices
involving centrifugal governors of fly-weight type
involving centrifugal governors of pump type
involving fluid governors of flow-controller type, i.e. the width of liquid flow being controlled by fly-weights
involving fluid governors of jet type
using regulating devices with proportional band and integral action, i.e. P.I. regulating devices
involving resilient restoring mechanisms
involving connecting means for superimposing a proportional regulating device and an integral regulating device
using regulating devices with proportional band and derivative action, i.e. P.D. regulating devices
involving centrifugal governors of fly-weight type exerting an acceleratory effect
involving restoring mechanisms exerting a delay effect
involving means for connecting a speed- regulating device and an acceleration- regulating device
using regulating devices with proportional band, derivative, and integral action, i.e. P.I.D. regulating devices
characterised by the use of electric means, e.g. use of a tachometric dynamo, use of a transducer converting an electric value into a displacement
Compensating the speed difference between engines meshing by a differential gearing or the speed difference between a controlling shaft and a controlled shaft
Governor units providing for co-operation with control dependent upon a variable other than speed
Control of mechanical force or stress; Control of mechanical pressure
characterised by the use of electric means
Control of fluid pressure
Modifications to reduce the effects of instability, e.g. due to vibrations, friction, abnormal temperature, overloading or imbalance
without auxiliary power
the sensing element being a flexible member yielding to pressure, e.g. diaphragm, bellows, capsule
Control of liquid pressure
the sensing element being a piston or plunger
the sensing element being a float
with auxiliary non-electric power
derived from the controlled fluid
derived from an external source
characterised by the use of electric means
Control of torque; Control of mechanical power
characterised by the use of electric means

title.en: Control of mechanical oscillations, e.g. of amplitude, of frequency, of phase
characterised by the use of electric means
Control of chemical or physico-chemical variables, e.g. pH-value
characterised by the use of electric means
Control of humidity
characterised by the use of electric means

title.ko: 온도의 제어
title.en: Control of temperature

title.ko: 보조동력이 없는 것
title.en: without auxiliary power

title.ko: 온도변화에 의하여 팽창 수축하는 검출요소를 갖는 것 (G05D23/13이 우선)
title.en: with sensing element expanding and contracting in response to changes of temperature (G05D0023130000 takes precedence)
with bimetallic element
with snap-action elements
with sensing element responsive to pressure or volume changes in a confined fluid
by varying the mixing ratio of two fluids having different temperatures
with auxiliary non-electric power

title.ko: 전기적 수단의 사용을 특징으로 하는 것
title.en: characterised by the use of electric means

title.ko: 온도변화에 의하여 전기적 또는 자기적 특성이 변화하는 검출요소를 갖는 것(G05D 23/13이 우선)
title.en: with sensing elements having variation of electric or magnetic properties with change of temperature (G05D0023130000 takes precedence)
the sensing element being a thermocouple
the sensing element having a resistance varying with temperature, e.g. thermistor
the sensing element having a permeability varying with temperature
with sensing element responsive to radiation
with sensing element expanding, contracting, or fusing in response to changes of temperature
Automatic controllers with an auxiliary heating device affecting the sensing element, e.g. for anticipating change of temperature
with provision for adjustment of the effect of the auxiliary heating device, e.g. as a function of time
Control of viscosity
characterised by the use of electric means

title.ko: 빛의 제어, 예. 강도, 색상 또는 위상 (광원에 독립적인 빛을 제어하기 위해 가동 또는 변형 가능한 요소를 사용하는 광학 소자 또는 장치 G02B26/00; 빛의 제어를 위한 소자 또는 장치의 매질의 광학적 특성을 변경하여 수정된 광학적 동작의 소자 또는 장치, 전자기파, 전자 또는 기타 소립자에 의한 빛의 제어, 그것을 위해 특히 적합한 회로 장치 G02F1/00)
title.en: Control of light, e.g. intensity, colour or phase  (optical devices or arrangements using movable or deformable elements for controlling light independent of the light source G02B0026000000; devices or arrangements, the optical operation of which is modified by changing the optical properties of the medium of the devices or arrangements for the control of light, circuit arrangements specially adapted therefor, control of light by electro-magnetic waves, electrons or other elementary particles G02F0001000000)
characterised by the use of electric means

title.ko: 메인그룹 G05D1/00 ~ G05D25/00 중 둘 이상에 포함되는 변수의 동시 제어
title.en: Simultaneous control of variables covered by two or more of main groups G05D0001000000-G05D0025000000
characterised by the use of electric means
Simultaneous control of electric and non-electric variables
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
Indexing scheme associated with group G05D0001000000
Details of software or hardware architectures used for the control of position
using artificial intelligence [AI] techniques
using machine learning, e.g. neural networks
using external object recognition
Adaptations for complying with regulatory restraints on the operations of the controlled vehicles, e.g. compliance with airspace or traffic regulations
Specific applications of the controlled vehicles
for soil shifting, building, civil engineering or mining, e.g. excavators
for cleaning, vacuuming or polishing
for harvesting, sowing or mowing in agriculture or forestry
for transportation
of humans
of freight
for social or care-giving applications
for combat
for communications, e.g. wireless network relays
for manufacturing, maintenance or repairing
for animal husbandry or control, e.g. catching, trapping or scaring of animals
for emergency activities, e.g. search and rescue, traffic accidents or fire fighting
for sport or gaming activities
for shows or performances
for displaying or announcing information
for information gathering, e.g. for academic research
for patrolling or reconnaissance for police, security or military applications
Specific environments of the controlled vehicles
Outdoor regulated spaces
Spaces reserved for vehicle traffic, e.g. roads, regulated airspace or regulated waters
Spaces with priority for humans, e.g. populated areas, pedestrian ways, parks or beaches
Land use
Off-road
Indoor domestic environment
Confined spaces, e.g. tanks, pipelines, tunnels or containers
Open buildings, e.g. offices, hospitals, shopping areas or universities
Industrial sites, e.g. warehouses or factories
Transportation hubs
Building sites; Civil engineering
Types of controlled vehicles
Land vehicles
with legs
Climbing vehicles
Holonomic vehicles, e.g. with omni wheels
Aircraft, e.g. drones
with fixed wings
Rotorcrafts
Missiles
Water vehicles
Space vehicles
Vehicles specially adapted for two or more of space, air, land or water environments, e.g. amphibious vehicles
Details of signals used for control of position, course, altitude or attitude of land, water, air or space vehicles
Optical signals
Acoustic signals, e.g. ultrasonic signals
Radio signals
Inductive-loop type signals
Internal signals, i.e. from sensors located in the vehicle, e.g. from compasses or angular sensors
Combination of two or more signals
of the same type, e.g. stereovision or optical flow
Sensor fusion
